---
title: "07. 不可公度、障碍与规范分层"
subtitle: "Incommensurability, Obstruction, and Canonical Stratification"
date: 2026-04-09
order: 7
categories: [elements, cultural, omega]
description: "How Book X converts failure of common measure into an explicit taxonomy of obstruction classes."
---

**Books:** Book X  
**Omega Directions:** `zeckendorf representation`, `spectral theory`, `rate-distortion information theory`

{{< include articles/category_07_incommensurability_obstruction_and_canonical_stratification.md >}}

---

[Back to Elements Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
